description_en: A former residence classified as a building among tangible cultural properties. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Nakagawa Aza Kamiidaira 949-1.

name_en: Seated statue of Shō-Kannon at Miyazaki
description_en: A seated statue of Shō-Kannon classified as a sculpture among tangible cultural properties. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located within the Daihi hall at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Nakagawa Aza Idaira 1786.

Yayoi-period pottery of the Miyazaki type classified as an archaeological artifact among tangible cultural properties. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It was excavated at the Miyazaki site in Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Nakagawa Aza Idaira 1886 and is stored at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Nakagawa Aza Kamiidaira (Kobushi-kan storehouse).

name_en: Site of the Miyazaki fortified residence
description_en: A fortified residence ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Nakagawa Aza Tatenokoshi 747-1.
A milestone mound (ichirizuka) classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Numazawa Aza Megurito.
A butterfly species classified as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town.

An old Japanese cedar (sugi) tree classified as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located within the precincts of Unadari Shrine at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Ōshio Aza Yōgai.

A three-lion dance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1973-04-28. It is located in the Kamikatsurao and Shimokatsurao administrative districts.

A cliff-carved Buddhist image (magaibutsu) classified as a historic site among monuments. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1975-06-05. It is located at Katsurao Aza Shikiibata.
A Japanese yew (ichii) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1975-06-05. It is located at Katsurao Aza Nakashimizu.

A Japanese cedar (sugi) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1975-06-05. It is located at Nogawa Aza Minaminakanouchi 71 (Hachiman Shrine).

A shrine hall classified as a building among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1988-12-05. It is located at Katsurao Aza Sekiba 100 (Isozaki Shrine).

A pair of great Japanese cedar (sugi) trees classified as a natural monument. They are village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1988-12-05. They are located at Katsurao Aza Sekiba 100 (Isozaki Shrine).

name_en: Gravestone group of the Yakushi Kannon magnate
description_en: A group of gravestones classified as a historic site among monuments. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1988-12-05. It is located at Katsurao Aza Sekiba 100 (Isozaki Shrine).

name_en: Statue of Dainichi Nyorai of the Diamond Realm
description_en: A Buddhist statue of Dainichi Nyorai classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1995-07-14. It is located at Katsurao Aza Kitadaira 11 (Yakushi-ji).

name_en: Hanging scroll of the nirvana image
description_en: A hanging scroll depicting the nirvana of the Buddha, classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1995-07-14. It is located at Katsurao Aza Kitadaira 11 (Yakushi-ji).

The Great Prajnaparamita Sutra in 600 volumes, classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1995-07-14. It is located at Katsurao Aza Kitadaira 11 (Yakushi-ji).

name_en: Rishubun sutra of the Great Prajnaparamita Sutra
description_en: The Rishubun section of the Great Prajnaparamita Sutra, classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1995-07-14. It is located at Katsurao Aza Kitadaira 11 (Yakushi-ji).

A cherry tree known as the sowing cherry (tanemaki-zakura), classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2008-06-18. It is located at Nogawa Aza Sekiba.

A cherry tree known as the sowing cherry (tanemaki-zakura), classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2008-06-18. It is located at Nogawa Aza Yudono.
A weeping cherry (shidarezakura) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2008-06-18. It is located at Katsurao Aza Sekiba.

name_en: Weeping cherry at the magnate's residence site
description_en: A weeping cherry (shidarezakura) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2008-06-18. It is located at Katsurao Aza Shikiibata.

A suspended gong (waniguchi) classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2020-09-07. It is located at Nogawa Aza Minaminakanouchi 71 (Hachiman Shrine).

A bell (suzu) classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2020-09-07. It is located at Nogawa Aza Minaminakanouchi 71 (Hachiman Shrine).

A portable shrine (mikoshi) classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2020-09-07. It is located at Nogawa Aza Minaminakanouchi 71 (Hachiman Shrine).

name_en: Worship hall, main hall, and auxiliary shrine of Kasuga Shrine
description_en: The worship hall, main hall, and auxiliary shrine classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Kawamata Town. It is located at Aza Miyamae 37, Kawamata-machi, Date District, Fukushima Prefecture.
A great zelkova (keyaki) tree classified as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Kawamata Town. It is located at Aza Miyamae 37, Kawamata-machi, Date District, Fukushima Prefecture.

name_en: Former site of the Hataori Gozen Hall at Ōshimizu
description_en: A former hall site classified as a place of scenic beauty among monuments. It is town-designated by Kawamata Town. It is located at Aza Higashiōshimizu 22, Kawamata-machi, Date District, Fukushima Prefecture.
A former stone bridge classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Kawamata Town. It is located at Aza Higashiōshimizu 22, Kawamata-machi, Date District, Fukushima Prefecture.
A stone stupa classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kawamata Town. It is located at Aza Nakajima 14, Kawamata-machi, Date District, Fukushima Prefecture.

name_en: Wooden seated statue of Nyoirin Kannon
description_en: A wooden seated statue of Nyoirin Kannon classified as a sculpture among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2006-01-04.

name_en: Wooden seated statue of Kokūzō Bosatsu
description_en: A wooden seated statue of Kokūzō Bosatsu classified as a sculpture among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2006-01-04.

name_en: Wooden seated statue of Amida Nyorai
description_en: A wooden seated statue of Amida Nyorai classified as a sculpture among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2006-01-04.
A sutra container (kyōzutsu) classified as a craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2006-01-04.

name_en: Great Prajnaparamita Sutra in 600 volumes with six sutra chests
description_en: The Great Prajnaparamita Sutra in 600 volumes with six sutra chests, classified as a classical text among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2006-01-04.

name_en: Memorial monument of the Endō family of Furu
description_en: A memorial monument classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2006-01-04.

name_en: Memorial monument of the Takahashi family of Furu
description_en: A memorial monument classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2006-01-04.
A memorial monument classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2006-01-04.
A memorial monument classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2006-01-04.

name_en: Farming votive tablet of Kyūchū Hachiman Shrine
description_en: An agricultural votive tablet (ema) classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Kitakata City, with designation dated 2008-07-22.
